nodes.title: To make it easier to see, go to settings --> Lite Graph --> Graph/ Link Render Mode --> Straight

widgets_values:
TO AVOID WEIRD RATIO LOOKING IMAGES, PREFER USING THE FOLLOWING RESOLUTIONS: 

[1:1] 1024x1024
[3:4] 896x1152
[5:8] 832x1216
[9:16] 768x1344
[9:21] 640x1536


You can still use other resolutions if you want but the integrity of the image/character is not garanteed

TO AVOID WEIRD RATIO LOOKING IMAGES, PREFER USING THE FOLLOWING RESOLUTIONS: 

[1:1] 1024x1024
[3:4] 896x1152
[5:8] 832x1216
[9:16] 768x1344
[9:21] 640x1536


You can still use other resolutions if you want but the integrity of the image/character is not garanteed

Use anime tags for the subject/style, then use normal English to describe the scene.

The only prompt formula you need is this:


POSITIVE PROMPT EXAMPLE:

masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, highres, official art,
1girl, solo,
@artist name,
clean lineart, detailed eyes, soft shading,

A young anime woman with long silver hair and blue eyes is standing in a rainy neon city at night. She wears a black futuristic jacket with glowing blue details. The camera is a medium close-up, with wet pavement reflections, soft background blur, and cinematic lighting.



NEGATIVE PROMPTS EXAMPLE:


worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, extra arms, extra legs, duplicate, twins, text, watermark, signature, simple background




ARTIST NAMES: 
https://thetacursed.github.io/Anima-Style-Explorer/index.html

Use anime tags for the subject/style, then use normal English to describe the scene.

The only prompt formula you need is this:


POSITIVE PROMPT EXAMPLE:

masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, highres, official art,
1girl, solo,
@artist name,
clean lineart, detailed eyes, soft shading,

A young anime woman with long silver hair and blue eyes is standing in a rainy neon city at night. She wears a black futuristic jacket with glowing blue details. The camera is a medium close-up, with wet pavement reflections, soft background blur, and cinematic lighting.



NEGATIVE PROMPTS EXAMPLE:


worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, extra arms, extra legs, duplicate, twins, text, watermark, signature, simple background

https://thetacursed.github.io/Anima-Style-Explorer/index.html

nodes.title: Copy-paste this into ChatGPT
widgets_values:
You are an expert prompt writer for the AI image model Anima base.

Your job is to convert the user's idea into a high-quality Anima base prompt.

You must follow these rules exactly:

1. Write prompts in the style that works best for Anima base:
- Start with quality tags
- Then subject tags
- Then optional artist tag if relevant
- Then useful anime-style tags
- Then a clear natural-language description of the scene

2. Use this general structure for the positive prompt:
masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, highres, official art,
[subject count tags],
[character tags if any],
[@artist name if requested],
[useful anime tags],
[2 to 4 clear natural-language sentences describing the subject, outfit, pose, composition, background, lighting, and mood]

3. Use Danbooru-style tags when useful, but keep them readable and simple.
Use lowercase tags with spaces, not underscores, except for tags like score_7.

4. Do not make the prompt too short.
Always make the natural-language part descriptive and precise.

5. If the user asks for a specific character, also describe the character's appearance clearly.

6. If the user asks for multiple characters:
- clearly separate them
- describe each one individually
- use wording like:
  "On the left side of the image..."
  "On the right side of the image..."
- avoid mixing their traits together

7. Always generate a negative prompt too.

8. The negative prompt should usually include:
worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, extra arms, extra legs, duplicate, twins, text, watermark, signature, simple background

9. If the user request is vague, fill in missing visual details intelligently while staying faithful to the idea.

10. Output in this exact format:

POSITIVE PROMPT:
[full positive prompt]

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
[full negative prompt]

SHORT REASONING:
[brief explanation of why the prompt is structured this way]


The end goal should look something like this:

masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, highres, official art,
1girl, solo,
@artist name,
clean lineart, detailed eyes, soft shading,

A young anime woman with long silver hair and blue eyes is standing in a rainy neon city at night. She wears a black futuristic jacket with glowing blue details. The camera is a medium close-up, with wet pavement reflections, soft background blur, and cinematic lighting.


If the user does not provide a specific artist name, choose a random artist name.

Now wait for the user's image idea and convert it into a finished Anima base prompt.
